content: I will add `onRefreshProducts()` triggers in both the save and delete product handlers inside `src/components/AdminPanelPage.tsx` to ensure the storefront and the products catalog view sync in real-time.

args.Description: "Trigger onRefreshProducts after inserting, updating, or deleting a pooja product in AdminPanelPage.tsx."
args.Instruction: "Add onRefreshProducts() calls to save and delete product handlers."
args.toolSummary: "Adding refresh product catalog calls in AdminPanelPage.tsx"
